scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && rm -rf dist/sqlite/migrations dist/postgres/migrations && mkdir -p dist/sqlite dist/postgres && cp -R src/sqlite/migrations dist/sqlite/migrations && cp -R src/postgres/migrations dist/postgres/migrations
scripts.test:postgres:runtime: node -e "if (!process.env.FASTIFLY_TEST_POSTGRES_URL && !process.env.TEST_POSTGRES_DATABASE_URL) { console.error('FASTIFLY_TEST_POSTGRES_URL or TEST_POSTGRES_DATABASE_URL is required for postgres.js runtime tests.'); process.exit(1); }" && vitest run src/__tests__/postgres-js-runtime.test.ts
scripts.test:postgres: pnpm run test:postgres:pglite && pnpm run test:postgres:runtime
scripts.db:migrate:sqlite: node -e "if (!process.env.DATABASE_URL) { console.error('DATABASE_URL is required for SQLite migrations.'); process.exit(1); }" && drizzle-kit migrate --config=drizzle.sqlite.config.ts
scripts.db:migrate:postgres: node -e "if (!process.env.DATABASE_URL) { console.error('DATABASE_URL is required for PostgreSQL migrations.'); process.exit(1); }" && drizzle-kit migrate --config=drizzle.postgres.config.ts
